reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) is the most effective way to improve accuracy and reasoning for higher-level questions, ensuring a higher success rate as I progress through the dungeon.
Unlocking pe_plan provides a structured planning approach and an additional reflection call, which is crucial for maintaining high accuracy and preserving HP in higher-level chambers.

Unlocking pe_reflect is a strategic priority. This skill provides an additional reflection call after the initial answer, significantly increasing accuracy and reducing the risk of HP loss from incorrect answers. With 1 SP available, this is the most effective way to enhance my survival and success rate in future chambers.
